Endurable and Reliable: With dimensions of 10x8.5x6cm, the Pet Care Cage Play Set made of PP material is perfect for your child's small hands. You can relax knowing that this endurable material ensures playtime without the hassle of breakage.

Portable Fun: Packed with fun accessories for hours of playtime, the Pet Care Cage Play Set is perfect for vacations and road trips. Kids can enjoy the portable fun anytime, anywhere thanks to its lightweight, compact design.

Gift Idea: Ideal for nurturing young minds, this Pet Care Cage Play Set is a wonderful gift for ages 3+ boys and girls, enhancing playtime and sparking imagination with its versatility as a themed party decoration or a cherished game prize for birthdays and holidays.
description: Product Description Dog Pretend Toys for Kids Complete Set With 1 cage, 4 dog figure toys, a bowl, bone, and brush included, this rich set provides everything for kids to nurture their canine companions. Ensured Durability Expertly crafted from PP material, this Pet Care Cage Play Set, sized at 10x8.5x6cm, ensures durability and is ideal for small hands, enhancing playtime without the worry of breakage. Enriches Playtime Experience Let your children's imagination fly with our Pet Care Cage Play Set. This playset is designed to stimulate imaginative play, improving cognitive development and problem-solving abilities. It's an ideal resource for any young learner looking to enhance their creative thinking skills. Complete with 1 pet cage, 4 dog toys, 1 pet bowl, 1 dog bone, and 1 brush, this set is perfect for your child's small hands. Stimulate their imagination as they care for their pup and take it on-the-go. Makes a great gift too!
